title: What Godly Humility Actually Looks Like
caption:
Most guys think humility means thinking less of themselves. Scripture never says that.

C.S. Lewis said it best: humility isn't thinking less of yourself, it's thinking of yourself less. The humble man isn't down on himself. He's just not spending his energy there.

You see it in how he takes correction. Defensive is pride wearing a disguise. Quiet and willing to actually change, that's the real thing. You see it in whether he'll kneel in public the same way he does in private. And here's what nobody tells you: it doesn't make him weaker. Moses was the meekest man alive and still led two million people out of Egypt.

"Whoever exalts himself will be humbled, and whoever humbles himself will be exalted." — Matthew 23:12

Strength that answers to somebody higher. That's what it actually looks like.

Save this for the next time pride tells you it's the same thing as confidence.

#faith #christianmen #humility #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #christianity
